features: CLASSIC DESIGN: The radio has a classic black design, strong carry handle, earphone socket, AM/FM wavebands, telescopic swivel antenna and rotary controls. Includes 4 different coloured facia panels to choose from to change the look of your radio (red, blue, green or yellow) to fit in with any room décor.

EASY TO USE: The simple design allows for easy set-up and operation, suitable for all to enjoy. Tune into your favourite AM and FM stations by searching on the tuner for different frequencies. Twist the large side dial to search between stations and the smaller dial underneath to adjust the volume level.
EARPHONE SOCKET: Listen to all your favourite radio stations with the use of the earphone socket for private listening. (Earphones not included).
MAINS OR BATTERY OPERATED: With dual power supply, plug into any UK mains socket to operate or alternatively, use wirelessly by inserting 4 x C batteries (not included).

PORTABLE WITH FOLD AWAY CARRY HANDLE: With 4 x C batteries inserted, the LLOYTRON 2 Band AC/DC Portable Radio is small and light enough to carry with you, making it ideal for garden parties, camping trips and more. Batteries not included.
description: From the manufacturer This AC/DC portable radio is the perfect entertainment companion for your on-the-go lifestyle. It features two bands, allowing you to listen to both AM and FM stations, with an easily adjustable telescopic antenna ensuring stellar reception at all times. With a carry handle and the choice of mains or battery operation, this radio is truly portable and ready to go wherever you are. It is available in 4 vibrant facia panel colours, bound to fit your style preferences. Insert 4 x C batteries to power it up and listen to your favourites on the go or connect to the mains for non-stop and uninterrupted experience and the earphone socket allows for private listening. Thoughtfully packed in a modern gift box, this radio has been designed to provide you with a seamless listening experience and comes with all the necessary product specifications conveniently displayed on the box. Red Facia Panel Yellow Facia Panel Green Facia Panel Blue Facia Panel
